column2: Test Case: Press/Media Handling and Prior-Notification to Landowners for Community Operations
column3: ['A user plans an operation in a community area. ', 'The user does not initiate press/media handling or prior-notification to landowners as required by cap 1616 and gdpr. ', 'The system receives a request for press/media access related to the planned operation in the community area. ', "The system fails to handle the press/media request due to the user's failure to follow required procedures. ", "The system does not notify landowners about the planned operation as a result of the user's failure to follow required procedures. "]
column4: ['The user has selected a location within the community area for their intended operation. ', 'The user has failed to follow the necessary procedures for press/media handling and prior-notification to landowners. ', 'The system acknowledges the press/media request. ', 'The system does not process or respond appropriately to the press/media request. ', 'Landowners are unaware of the intended operation in their community area. ']
